Story.title: Story
Story.description: A before and after showcase of a construction project.

clientName.description: The name of the client for the project.

beforeUrl.description: URL to the media showing the project before.

afterUrl.description: URL to the media showing the project after.

type.description: The type of media (video or image).

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when the story was created.

publicLanguage.description: The language displayed on the public site.

companyName.description: The name of the company displayed on the site.

/stories/{storyId}.description: Collection of before and after stories.
